error_signature: unable to read CSV from local folder
title: CSV file not readable from local folder in Docker on Synology
symptom: The user is unable to read a CSV file from a local folder when using n8n in a Docker container on Synology. They receive no specific error message but indicate that the relative path and absolute path are not working.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker container
root_cause: The issue arises because the Docker container may not have the correct volume mounts or permissions set to access the local folder where the CSV file is stored. Without proper mounts, n8n cannot access the file system outside the container.
fix_steps: Edit the container settings to add a volume mount for the local folder.
Ensure the path is correctly specified in n8n.
Adjust permissions for the Docker and system user to read from the shared folder.
agent_instruction: Ensure the Docker container has the correct volume mounts and permissions to access the local CSV file.
